reason: Address Greptile and maintainer follow-up on production sync resource handling.

changes.summary: Map the sync-facing hottest-json resource to the typed hottest_json table while preserving the generic resource name, and add Lobsters short_id resource ID overrides.
Teach single-object sync handling and runtime ID extraction about the production hottest-json resource name and Lobsters short_id fields.
Open existing local stores with OpenReadOnly for local read paths.
Use the production hottest-json resource name and short_id payload shape in the typed-table regression test.

validated_outcome: go test ./... and publish validation rerun after patch
